rationale: Educ. Code §32.035 governs technology demonstration programs and has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions or school funding formulas affected by exemption changes.
quote:
Sec. 32.035. DEMONSTRATION PROGRAMS. (a) The agency shall establish demonstration programs to:
(1) investigate the uses, effectiveness, and feasibility of technologies for education; and
(2) provide models for effective education using technology.
_note: No conflict; rule is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
